meta.title: Killio Vault — Android-first AI companion
meta.description: Vault turns your Android phone into a 24/7 AI workspace: voice diary, voice-first assistant, local agents with RAG memory, and every Killio tool in your pocket.
meta.ogTitle: Killio Vault — your phone as a 24/7 AI workspace
meta.ogDescription: On-device audio diary, push-to-talk assistant with wake-word, local agents with RAG memory, and client tools to call, open apps, and more.

hero.titlePrefix: Killio Vault — your phone as a
hero.titleSuffix: Diary, assistant and local agents in your pocket.
hero.sub: Vault records and transcribes your day locally, listens when you say "Hey Killio" and runs the same agents you use on killio.dev — without shipping anything off-device you don't want to.
hero.platformNote: Android 10+ · sideload · iOS on the roadmap

features.title: Six pillars, one always-on companion.
features.sub: Every Killio surface adapted for mobile — no features cut.

assistant.title: Voice-first assistant
assistant.desc: Push-to-talk or wake-word. Same /agent loop as the web, with native device TTS.

diary.title: 24/7 diary
diary.desc: Foreground microphone service that records and transcribes locally — no credits burned.

workspace.title: Workspace mobile
workspace.desc: Documents, boards and rooms rendered 1:1 with the web — edit mode included.

agents.title: Local agents with RAG
agents.desc: Persistent per-user / per-workspace memory the agent searches before every reply.

wakeword.title: "Hey Killio" wake-word
wakeword.desc: Opt-in local detector that activates the assistant hands-free — fully on-device.

clientTools.title: Client tools
clientTools.desc: call_number, open_app, send_sms, open_browser — the agent acts on your phone with confirmation.

screens.title: Designed for mobile, not shrunk into it.
screens.sub: Seven surfaces thought for thumb, voice and pocket.

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.desc: Talk to Killio like a colleague: ask anything, request a tool run or search your memory.

bullets.one: Local "Hey Killio" wake-word — opt-in and fully on-device.
bullets.two: Push-to-talk with a big button for hands-free calls or noisy environments.
bullets.three: Replies with native TTS, live transcript and on-screen confirmed actions.

diary.title: Diary
diary.desc: Your day captured as a document — transcribed audio segments, AI summary and highlights.

bullets.one: Foreground service records in short chunks and transcribes them locally.
bullets.two: Auto-summary of the day and topic tags generated by the agent.
bullets.three: Private by default — the diary never leaves the device unless you sync it.

documents.title: Documents
documents.desc: The full brick renderer — rich text, callouts, tables and checklists — right on your phone.

bullets.one: Workspace folder tree and document list, with search.
bullets.two: Bricks 1:1 with the web — including experimental edit mode.
bullets.three: Works offline: edits sync when you're back online.

mockup.p: Close the auth module and kick off mobile onboarding.
mockup.callout: Reminder: review P0 bugs before Thursday.

boardsKanban.title: Boards · Kanban
boardsKanban.desc: Boards with drag, assignees, tags and priority — same as the web but thumb-friendly.

bullets.one: Horizontal list chips to switch columns without losing orientation.
bullets.two: Cards with assignee avatars, priority dot and color tags.
bullets.three: Long-press and drag between lists, or ask the assistant to move them for you.

mockup.card3: Bug: TTS cuts off on Android 14

boardsGantt.title: Boards · Gantt
boardsGantt.desc: See your sprint on a timeline. Toggle day, week and month without opening your laptop.

bullets.one: Day / week / month toggle in the header — grid re-renders automatically.
bullets.two: Color bars per list, with assignees and progress visible on tap.
bullets.three: Pinch-to-zoom and horizontal scroll for long sprints.

mockup.weekLabel: Mon · Tue · Wed · Thu · Fri · Sat · Sun

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.desc: Workspace chats with built-in AI — mention @killio and the agent replies with full context.

bullets.one: Per-user chat bubbles with avatars and relative timestamps.
bullets.two: Mention @killio to invoke the workspace agent — uses your tools and memory.
bullets.three: Voice notes with auto transcription so you can reply on the move.

mockup.msg1: Did anyone review the onboarding mocks?
mockup.msg2: @killio summarize the decisions from last standup
mockup.killioReply: They moved the wake-word to phase 2 and prioritized the diary.

agents.title: Local agents
agents.desc: Build agents with their own personality, custom wake-phrase and selected tools — all configured on-device.

bullets.one: Agent picker with custom wake-phrase ("Hey Coach", "Hey Journal").
bullets.two: Personality and system prompt preview before activating.
bullets.three: Local agent config never leaves your phone.

one.title: Install the APK
one.desc: Download the latest build, enable "install from unknown sources" and tap install.

two.title: Grant microphone and foreground service
two.desc: Vault needs these permissions to record the diary and keep the assistant alive without Android killing it.

three.title: Say "Hey Killio"
three.desc: The wake-word activates the assistant. Ask anything or request a workspace tool run.

privacy.title: Your data lives on the phone by default.
privacy.desc: Vault is designed so you decide what leaves the device and when. Diary, agent memory and wake-word work 100% on-device.

bullets.one: Diary STT runs on-device — no cost, no server transmission.
bullets.two: Local agent config (wake-phrase, prompt, tools) never leaves the phone.
bullets.three: Explicit consent banner before enabling recording or wake-word.

cta.title: Download Vault and start now.
cta.sub: The latest APK is always one click away. Sideload, sign in with your Killio account and pick a workspace.
